subcodes.first_line: O our Lord! Unto Thee do we turn, and before Thy presence do we humbly supplicate. We remember Thee with glorification and praise, and offer unto Thee our adoration [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ربنا انا نتوجه الیک و نتضرع بین یدیک نذکرک بالتهلیل و التکبیر و نثنی علیک
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
